logger.doc:name: Log Platform Event Payload
logger.message: INCOMING PLATFORM EVENT PAYLOAD: #[write(payload, 'application/json')]

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output text/plain
var event = payload.event var idRaw = event.HealthFusion_Patient_Record_ID__c default "" var id = if (upper(idRaw) startsWith "HF") idRaw[2 to -1] else idRaw var useId = (id != null and id != "") var dob = if ((event.Date_of_Birth__c default null) != null) ((event.Date_of_Birth__c) as Date {format: "MMMM dd, yyyy"}) as String {format:"yyyyMMdd"} else "" var gt1dob = if (dob != "") dob ++ "000000" else "" var hl7Name = upper(event.LastName__c default "") ++ "^" ++ upper(event.FirstName__c default "") var normGender = if (upper(event.Patient_Gender__c default "") == "M") "M" else if (upper(event.Patient_Gender__c default "") == "F") "F" else "U" var normLang = event.Language__c default "EN" var patientRace = event.Patient_Race__c default "PATIENT DECLINED" var patientEthnicity = event.Patient_Ethnicity__c default "PATIENT DECLINED" var phone = event.Phone__c default "" var email = event.Email__c default "" var phoneFormatted = event.PhoneNumberFormatted__c default "" var nicePhone = if (!isEmpty(phoneFormatted)) phoneFormatted else if (!isEmpty(phone) and sizeOf(phone) == 10) "(" ++ phone[0 to 2] ++ ")" ++ phone[3 to 5] ++ "-" ++ phone[6 to 9] else phone var area = if (!isEmpty(phone) and sizeOf(phone) >= 3) phone[0 to 2] else "" var rest = if (!isEmpty(phone) and sizeOf(phone) >= 7) phone[3 to 9] else "" var contactInfo = nicePhone ++ "^^^" ++ (if (!isEmpty(email)) email else "") ++ "^^" ++ area ++ "^" ++ rest
--- ( "MSH|^~\&|HEALTHFUSION^1266378|NEXTGENOFFICE^1266378|FORESTHMS|FORESTHMS^1266378|" ++ now() as String {format: "yyyyMMddHHmmss"} ++ "||ADT^A04|" ++ (now() as String {format:"yyyyMMddHHmmssSSS"}) ++ "|P|2.3" ++ "
PID|1|" ++ (if (useId) id else "") ++ "|" // PID-2 ++ (if (useId) id else "") ++ "|" // PID-3 ++ (if (useId) "HF" ++ id else "") ++ "|" // PID-4 ++ ( upper(event.LastName__c default "") ++ "^" ++ upper(event.FirstName__c default "") ++ (if (!isEmpty(event.MiddleName__c default "")) "^" ++ (upper(event.MiddleName__c) default "") else "") ) ++ "|" // Name field, middle name only if present ++ "|" // PID-6 (Mother's maiden) blank if not present ++ dob ++ "|" // PID-7 ++ normGender ++ "|" // PID-8 ++ "|" // PID-9 ++ patientRace ++ "|" // PID-10 ++ ( upper(event.MailingStreet__c default "") ++ "^^" ++ upper(event.MailingCity__c default "") ++ "^" ++ upper(event.MailingState__c default "") ++ "^" ++ upper(event.MailingPostalCode__c default "") ) ++ "|" // PID-11 Address ++ contactInfo ++ "|" // PID-13 Phone/Email ++ "|" // PID-14 ++ upper(normLang) ++ "|" // PID-15 Language ++ "|||||||" // PID-16-21 blanks ++ patientRace // PID-22 ++ "
PV1|1|O|^^^1275017^^^^^FOREST HILLS||||||||1275017^^^1275017^^^^^FOREST HILLS|||||||||||||||||||||||N|||||1266378;FOREST HILLS MEDICAL SERVICES;FORESTHMS" ++ "
GT1|1|" ++ "1|" // GT1-1 ++ (if (useId) id else "") ++ "|" // GT1-2 ++ ( upper(event.LastName__c default "") ++ "^" ++ upper(event.FirstName__c default "") ++ (if (!isEmpty(event.MiddleName__c default "")) "^" ++ (upper(event.MiddleName__c) default "") else "") ) ++ "|" // GT1-3: name, no caret if no middle ++ "|" // GT1-4 blank ++ ( upper(event.MailingStreet__c default "") ++ "^^" ++ upper(event.MailingCity__c default "") ++ "^" ++ upper(event.MailingState__c default "") ++ "^" ++ upper(event.MailingPostalCode__c default "") ) ++ "|" // GT1-5: address ++ contactInfo ++ "|" // GT1-6: phone/email (all carets) ++ "|" // GT1-7 blank ++ gt1dob ++ "|" // GT1-8 DOB ++ normGender ++ "|" // GT1-9 ++ "|" // GT1-10 blank ++ "OTHER" // GT1-11 Relationship: OTHER )

logger.doc:name: HL7 Message Logger
logger.message: HL7 MESSAGE GENERATED: #[payload]

logger.doc:name: NextGen Outbound
logger.message: Sending HL7 message to NextGen API, switch is ON

logger.doc:name: NextGen Outbound
logger.message: Not sending HL7 message to NextGen API, switch is OFF. HL7 message was logged to console only.

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output text/plain
var pe = payload.event var apptId = (pe.NextGen_ID__c default "") as String var pid = if (pe.Patient_ID__c startsWith "HF") pe.Patient_ID__c[2 to -1] else pe.Patient_ID__c var dob = if (pe.Patient_DOB__c != null) (pe.Patient_DOB__c as Date {format:"yyyy-MM-dd"}) as String {format:"yyyyMMdd"} else "" var gender = if (pe.Patient_Gender__c == "Female") "F" else if (pe.Patient_Gender__c == "Male") "M" else "U" var phone = pe.Patient_Phone__c var phone_formatted = if (sizeOf(phone) == 10) "(" ++ phone[0 to 2] ++ ")" ++ phone[3 to 5] ++ "-" ++ phone[6 to 9] else phone var area = if (!isEmpty(phone) and sizeOf(phone)>=3) phone[0 to 2] else "" var rest = if (!isEmpty(phone) and sizeOf(phone)>=7) phone[3 to 9] else "" var contactInfo = phone_formatted ++ "^^^" ++ "^^" ++ area ++ "^" ++ rest var status = if (pe.Status__c == "Scheduled") "NEW" else if (pe.Status__c == "RESCHEDULED") "RESCHEDULED" else if (pe.Status__c == "Checked Out") "CHECKED OUT" else if (pe.Status__c == "Checked In") "CHECKED IN" else if (pe.Status__c == "Cancelled by Provider") "CANCELLED" else upper(pe.Status__c)
var schStart = pe.Start_DateTime__c as DateTime var schStartStr = schStart as String {format:"yyyyMMddHHmmss"} var schEnd = if (pe.Duration_Value__c != null and pe.Duration_Value__c != "") (schStart + (pe.Duration_Value__c as Number) * 60000) else schStart var schEndStr = schEnd as String {format:"yyyyMMddHHmmss"}
--- ( // MSH "MSH|^~\&|HEALTHFUSION^1266378|NEXTGENOFFICE^1266378|FORESTHMS|FORESTHMS^1266378|" ++ now() as String {format: "yyyyMMddHHmmss"} ++ "||SIU^S12|" ++ apptId ++ "|P|2.3" // SCH ++ "
SCH||" ++ apptId ++ "||||" ++ pe.Appointment_Type__c ++ "|" ++ pe.Appointment_Reason__c ++ "|" ++ pe.Appointment_Type__c ++ "|" ++ (pe.Duration_Value__c as String) ++ "|MIN|" ++ "^^^" ++ schStartStr ++ "^" ++ schEndStr ++ "|||||" ++ pe.Provider_NPI__c ++ "^" ++ pe.Provider_Last_Name__c ++ "^" ++ pe.Provider_First_Name__c ++ "|||||||||" ++ status // PID ++ "
PID|1|" ++ pid ++ "|" ++ pid ++ "|" ++ "HF" ++ pid ++ "|" ++ pe.Patient_Last_Name__c ++ "^" ++ pe.Patient_First_Name__c ++ "|" ++ "|" // Mother's maiden name ++ dob ++ "|" ++ gender ++ "|" ++ "|" // PID-9 ++ "PATIENT DECLINED|" // PID-10 Race ++ pe.Patient_Street__c ++ "^^" ++ pe.Patient_City__c ++ "^" ++ pe.Patient_State__c ++ "^" ++ pe.Patient_Zip__c ++ "|" ++ contactInfo ++ "||" ++ (pe.Patient_Language__c default "EN") ++ "|||||||PATIENT DECLINED" // PV1 ++ "
PV1|1|O|^^^" ++ pe.Location_ID__c ++ "^^^^^" ++ pe.Location_Name__c ++ "||||" ++ pe.Provider_NPI__c ++ "^" ++ pe.Provider_Last_Name__c ++ "^" ++ pe.Provider_First_Name__c ++ "||||" ++ "1275017^^^1275017^^^^^FOREST HILLS||||||||" ++ apptId ++ "||||||||||||||||||||1266378;FOREST HILLS MEDICAL SERVICES;FORESTHMS|||||" ++ schStartStr ++ "|" ++ schEndStr // RGS ++ "
RGS|" // AIL: location resource ++ "
AIL|1||" ++ pe.Location_ID__c ++ "^^^" ++ pe.Location_Name__c // AIP: provider resource ++ "
AIP|1||" ++ pe.Provider_NPI__c ++ "^" ++ pe.Provider_Last_Name__c ++ "^" ++ pe.Provider_First_Name__c )

logger.doc:name: HL7 Message Logger
logger.message: HL7 MESSAGE GENERATED: #[payload]

logger.doc:name: NextGen Outbound
logger.message: Sending HL7 message to NextGen API, switch is ON

logger.doc:name: NextGen Outbound
logger.message: Not sending HL7 message to NextGen API, switch is OFF. HL7 message was logged to console only.

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output text/plain
var pe = payload.event var apptId = pe.NextGen_ID__c var pid = if (pe.Patient_ID__c startsWith "HF") pe.Patient_ID__c[2 to -1] else pe.Patient_ID__c var dob = if (pe.Patient_DOB__c != null) (pe.Patient_DOB__c as Date {format:"yyyy-MM-dd"}) as String {format:"yyyyMMdd"} else "" var gender = if (pe.Patient_Gender__c == "Female") "F" else if (pe.Patient_Gender__c == "Male") "M" else "U" var phone = pe.Patient_Phone__c var phone_formatted = if (sizeOf(phone) == 10) "(" ++ phone[0 to 2] ++ ")" ++ phone[3 to 5] ++ "-" ++ phone[6 to 9] else phone var area = if (!isEmpty(phone) and sizeOf(phone)>=3) phone[0 to 2] else "" var rest = if (!isEmpty(phone) and sizeOf(phone)>=7) phone[3 to 9] else "" var contactInfo = phone_formatted ++ "^^^" ++ "^^" ++ area ++ "^" ++ rest var status = if (pe.Status__c == "Cancelled by Provider") "CANCELLED" else if (upper(pe.Status__c) == "NO SHOW") "NO SHOW" else upper(pe.Status__c)
var schStart = pe.Start_DateTime__c as DateTime var schStartStr = schStart as String {format:"yyyyMMddHHmmss"} var schEnd = if (pe.Duration_Value__c != null and pe.Duration_Value__c != "") (schStart + (pe.Duration_Value__c as Number) * 60000) else schStart var schEndStr = schEnd as String {format:"yyyyMMddHHmmss"}
--- ( // MSH "MSH|^~\&|HEALTHFUSION^1266378|NEXTGENOFFICE^1266378|FORESTHMS|FORESTHMS^1266378|" ++ now() as String {format: "yyyyMMddHHmmss"} ++ "||SIU^S15|" ++ apptId ++ "|P|2.3" // SCH ++ "
SCH||" ++ apptId ++ "||||" ++ pe.Appointment_Type__c ++ "|" ++ pe.Appointment_Reason__c ++ "|" ++ pe.Appointment_Type__c ++ "|" ++ (pe.Duration_Value__c as String) ++ "|MIN|" ++ "^^^" ++ schStartStr ++ "^" ++ schEndStr ++ "|||||" ++ pe.Provider_NPI__c ++ "^" ++ pe.Provider_Last_Name__c ++ "^" ++ pe.Provider_First_Name__c ++ "|||||||||" ++ status // PID ++ "
PID|1|" ++ pid ++ "|" ++ pid ++ "|" ++ "HF" ++ pid ++ "|" ++ pe.Patient_Last_Name__c ++ "^" ++ pe.Patient_First_Name__c ++ "|" ++ "|" // Mother's maiden name ++ dob ++ "|" ++ gender ++ "|" ++ "|" // PID-9 ++ "PATIENT DECLINED|" // PID-10 Race ++ pe.Patient_Street__c ++ "^^" ++ pe.Patient_City__c ++ "^" ++ pe.Patient_State__c ++ "^" ++ pe.Patient_Zip__c ++ "|" ++ contactInfo ++ "||" ++ (pe.Patient_Language__c default "EN") ++ "|||||||PATIENT DECLINED" // PV1 ++ "
PV1|1|O|^^^" ++ pe.Location_ID__c ++ "^^^^^" ++ pe.Location_Name__c ++ "||||" ++ pe.Provider_NPI__c ++ "^" ++ pe.Provider_Last_Name__c ++ "^" ++ pe.Provider_First_Name__c ++ "||||" ++ "1275017^^^1275017^^^^^FOREST HILLS||||||||" ++ apptId ++ "||||||||||||||||||||1266378;FOREST HILLS MEDICAL SERVICES;FORESTHMS|||||" ++ schStartStr ++ "|" ++ schEndStr // RGS ++ "
RGS|" // AIL: location resource ++ "
AIL|1||" ++ pe.Location_ID__c ++ "^^^" ++ pe.Location_Name__c // AIP: provider resource ++ "
AIP|1||" ++ pe.Provider_NPI__c ++ "^" ++ pe.Provider_Last_Name__c ++ "^" ++ pe.Provider_First_Name__c )

logger.doc:name: HL7 Message Logger
logger.message: HL7 MESSAGE GENERATED: #[payload]

logger.doc:name: NextGen Outbound
logger.message: Sending HL7 message to NextGen API, switch is ON

logger.doc:name: NextGen Outbound
logger.message: Not sending HL7 message to NextGen API, switch is OFF. HL7 message was logged to console only.

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output text/plain
var event = payload.event var idRaw = event.HealthFusion_Patient_Record_ID__c default "" var id = if (upper(idRaw) startsWith "HF") idRaw[2 to -1] else idRaw var useId = (id != null and id != "") var dob = if ((event.Date_of_Birth__c default null) != null) ((event.Date_of_Birth__c) as Date {format: "MMMM dd, yyyy"}) as String {format:"yyyyMMdd"} else "" var gt1dob = if (dob != "") dob ++ "000000" else "" var middleName = event.MiddleName__c default "" var hl7Name = upper(event.LastName__c default "") ++ "^" ++ upper(event.FirstName__c default "") ++ (if (!isEmpty(event.MiddleName__c default "")) "^" ++ upper(event.MiddleName__c) else "") var normGender = if (upper(event.Patient_Gender__c default "") == "M") "M" else if (upper(event.Patient_Gender__c default "") == "F") "F" else "U" var normLang = event.Language__c default "EN" var patientRace = event.Patient_Race__c default "PATIENT DECLINED" var patientEthnicity = event.Patient_Ethnicity__c default "PATIENT DECLINED" var phone = event.Phone__c default "" var email = event.Email__c default "" var phoneFormatted = event.PhoneNumberFormatted__c default "" var nicePhone = if (!isEmpty(phoneFormatted)) phoneFormatted else if (!isEmpty(phone) and sizeOf(phone) == 10) "(" ++ phone[0 to 2] ++ ")" ++ phone[3 to 5] ++ "-" ++ phone[6 to 9] else phone var area = if (!isEmpty(phone) and sizeOf(phone) >= 3) phone[0 to 2] else "" var rest = if (!isEmpty(phone) and sizeOf(phone) >= 7) phone[3 to 9] else "" var contactInfo = nicePhone ++ "^^^" ++ (if (!isEmpty(email)) email else "") ++ "^^" ++ area ++ "^" ++ rest
--- ( "MSH|^~\&|HEALTHFUSION^1266378|NEXTGENOFFICE^1266378|FORESTHMS|FORESTHMS^1266378|" ++ now() as String {format: "yyyyMMddHHmmss"} ++ "||ADT^A08|" ++ upper(uuid() as String) ++ "|P|2.3" ++ "
PID|1|" ++ (if (useId) id else "") ++ "|" ++ (if (useId) id else "") ++ "|" ++ (if (useId) "HF" ++ id else "HF") ++ "|" ++ hl7Name ++ "|" ++ "|" // PID-6 blank (mother's maiden name) ++ dob ++ "|" ++ normGender ++ "||" ++ patientRace ++ "|" ++ (event.MailingStreet__c default "") ++ "^^" ++ (event.MailingCity__c default "") ++ "^" ++ (event.MailingState__c default "") ++ "^" ++ (event.MailingPostalCode__c default "") ++ "|" ++ contactInfo ++ "||" ++ normLang ++ "|||||||" ++ patientEthnicity ++ "
PV1|1|O|^^^1275017^^^^^FOREST HILLS||||||||1275017^^^1275017^^^^^FOREST HILLS|||||||||||||||||||||||N|||||1266378;FOREST HILLS MEDICAL SERVICES;FORESTHMS" ++ "
GT1|1|" ++ (if (useId) id else "") ++ "|" // GT1-2 ++ hl7Name ++ "|" ++ "|" // GT1-4 blank ++ (event.MailingStreet__c default "") ++ "^^" ++ (event.MailingCity__c default "") ++ "^" ++ (event.MailingState__c default "") ++ "^" ++ (event.MailingPostalCode__c default "") ++ "|" ++ contactInfo ++ "||" ++ gt1dob ++ "|" ++ normGender ++ "||OTHER" )

logger.doc:name: HL7 Message Logger
logger.message: HL7 MESSAGE GENERATED: #[payload]

logger.doc:name: NextGen Outbound
logger.message: Sending HL7 message to NextGen API, switch is ON

logger.doc:name: NextGen Outbound
logger.message: Not sending HL7 message to NextGen API, switch is OFF. HL7 message was logged to console only.

logger.doc:name: Unknown EventType - Skipped
logger.message: Skipped payload, unknown EventType: #[payload.event.Event_Type__c]

logger.doc:name: Log NextGenServiceAppointment__e Payload
logger.message: INCOMING NEXTGEN SERVICE APPOINTMENT: #[write(payload, 'application/json')]

logger.doc:name: HL7 Message Logger
logger.message: HL7 MESSAGE GENERATED: #[payload]

logger.doc:name: NextGen Outbound
logger.message: Sending HL7 message to NextGen API, switch is ON

logger.doc:name: NextGen Outbound
logger.message: Not sending HL7 message to NextGen API, switch is OFF. HL7 message was logged to console only.

logger.doc:name: HL7 Message Logger
logger.message: HL7 MESSAGE GENERATED: #[payload]

logger.doc:name: NextGen Outbound
logger.message: Sending HL7 message to NextGen API, switch is ON

logger.doc:name: NextGen Outbound
logger.message: Not sending HL7 message to NextGen API, switch is OFF. HL7 message was logged to console only.

logger.doc:name: Unknown EventType - Skipped
logger.message: Skipped NextGenServiceAppointment__e: unknown EventType: #[payload.event.Event_Type__c]
